titleStmt.title: SII 9.444: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 444. (A.R. No. 414 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE PRAKARA OF THE MAHALINGESVARA TEMPLE AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1356, Pramādi, Kārtika, corresponding to A.D. 1433 October-November, in the reign of Dēvarāya-Mahārāya. It records that while the Mahāpradhāna Chandarasa-Oḍeya was ruling over Bārakūra-rājya a grant of land was made by Īsara-Seṭṭi for keeping a perpetual lamp before the god Nakharēśvara and feeding a fixed number of Brāhmans in the temple on special days.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ śrīsaresvatyai namaḥ śrīgurubhyō namaḥ Avighnamastu . namastuṁ
gaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśakavarṣa 1356 neya pramādisaṁvatsarada kārtika
māsadalu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa dēvarāyamahā
rāyarū vijayānagarada siṁhāsanadalirdu sakalasā(ṁ)mrājyavanāḷutiha kāladali Avara
nirūpadiṁda śrīmanmahāpradhāna caṁdarasavoḍeyarū bārakūra rājyavanū prati
pālisutiha kāladali basurūra paḍuvakēryya kakkeye baḷiya seṭṭikāra bāḷuseṭṭiya ma
ga gōḷara baḷiya �yosaraseṭṭi śrīnakhaṭhēśvaradēvarali māḍida dharmmada vivara dinaṁprati dinada
pūjeyali Uṁba brāhmaṇa vobba . dvādaśige yibbaru . pradōṣake yibbaru . Amā
vāsege yibbaru . dēvarige voṁdu naṁdādīvige . yidakke keṁcanakeṟeyeṁba bāḷu Ā bā
ḷina catusīmeya vivara . mūḍalu mūṟukērya halara paḍuvakērya halara dēvasva
da gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu mūru kēryya halara hūvinakāra dugaṇaseṭṭiya gaḍi
yiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu Uḍupara baḷiya seṭṭikāra viṭhalaseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
mūḍalu baḍagalu seṭṭikāra viṭhalaseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁ gōcarada baḷiyavara tōṭada gaḍi
yiṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catuḥsīmeyiṁdoḷagaṇa gade 2 kkaṁ bittuva bede gaṇagilu
nāgaṇḍeyalu mu 4 tōṭada catuḥsīmeya vivara . moḍalu mūḍakēryya paḍuvakēryya
halara dēvasvada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu kuḍuvana keṟeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu pa
ḍuvalu beṁmāḍana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalū bāleyaṇaseṭṭiya
hittila paḍuvēkeryya mūḍakēryya halara dēvasvadiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catuḥsī
meyiṁdoḷagaṇa hittilu 1 �yo hittila hasugeyali baṁda hittila catuḥsīme
ya vivara mūḍalu mūḍakēryya halara dēvasvadiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu paḍuva
kēryya halara dēvasvadiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu taṁmaṇakoṁgana gaḍiyiṁda
ṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu bāubēhāriya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catu
ssīmeyiṁdoḷagaṇa hittilu 1 Aṁtu hittilu 2 kkaṁ teṟu kā ga 3¥ 0 . Ī hittila
nū Ā 4 muḍi gadeyanū badu 12 muḍi Akkiyanū 1 naṁdādīvigeyanū
naḍasi migilādadanū ĪsaraseṭṭiIṁ baḷika maṁjusāvaṁtana kuṭuṁbadali dē
vakka dēsiṁgaseṭṭiya kuṭuṁbadali kōṭiyakka be(ṁ)mmaṇāḷuvana kuṭuṁbada
li �yosarāḷuvana makkaḷu Ī mūvaru tāya makkaḷū bāḷuvaru gōjarade baḷi
yavara maneyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu gōjarade baḷiyavara maneyiṁdaṁ paḍuva
lu yī naḍuvaṇa maneyanū Āruvāradaḍḍake 2 bhāgiya maneyanū hitti
lu sahavāgi kuppiseṭṭiya maga hariyappaseṭṭige mūlava koṭeU paḍuva
kaḍeya Oṁdu bhāgiya maneyanū hittilu sahita �yosaraseṭṭi taṁna moṁmakka
ḷu māṇiseṭṭiya maga nāraṇaseṭṭiya madavaḷige dēvakka kanyādānavāgi ko
ṭṭa sōmārada beṁmaṇaseṭṭi tānu taṁna makkaḷa kāla tanaka 4 muḍi taḷavanū gēṇige
bitti varuṣaṁprati bānagēḍu baṟagēḍu yeṁnade 12 muḍi Akkiyanū . rudra
pūjege varuṣaṁprati haṁjekereya hāneyali Oraveyakkiyanū naḍasi baha
ru Oṁdu kāladakki sikkidare Akkiya koṭṭu bāḷa Obbesuvaru tōṭakke
tekala maṁḍe 4 nālpaḍara Oppa muddaṇadēvaru �yo dharmavanū paḍuvakērya
halaru seṭṭikārarū pālisuvavaru . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānātsrēyōnu
pālanaṁ . dānātsvarggamavāpnōti pālanādaccudaṁ padaṁ . śrī
Digital edition of SII 9.444 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
